programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: As a new season dawns on the Western Australian Goldfields, five hard core crews of gold prospectors must push themselves and their dreams to the limit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: When Germanwings Flight 9525 crashes in the French Alps, investigators are faced with a sinister explanation that's almost beyond belief.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mighty Cruise Ships
programme.desc: This 50-year-old ocean liner offers off-season Baltic tours, battling unpredictable weather to deliver one-of-a-kind experiences.

programme.desc: The captains must decide if skill or luck will help them win as the quota fills up.
